ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cancer_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer case record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the case is reported */,
  "age_adjusted_incidence_rate" REAL /* Age-adjusted incidence rate of cancer cases per 100,000 population */,
  "confidence_interval_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for the incidence rate */,
  "confidence_interval_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for the incidence rate */,
  "ci_rank_low" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the CI rank */,
  "ci_rank_high" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the CI rank */,
  "average_annual_count" INTEGER /* Average annual count of cancer cases */,
  "percent_late_stage" REAL /* Percentage of cases diagnosed at a late stage */,
  "stage_at_diagnosis" TEXT /* Stage of cancer at diagnosis (e.g., Stage I, Stage II, etc.) */,
  "cancer_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of cancer (e.g., HER2-positive, triple-negative, etc.) */,
  "year_of_diagnosis" INTEGER /* Year in which the cancer was diagnosed */,
  "month_of_diagnosis" TEXT /* Month in which the cancer was diagnosed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_cases_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the county (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Rate of urbanization in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "cancer_incidence_rate" REAL /* Cancer incidence rate per 100,000 population in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "national_registries" (
  "registry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each national registry */,
  "registry_name" TEXT /* Name of the national registry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the registry */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the registry */,
  "data_quality_rate" REAL /* Rate of data quality (e.g., completeness, accuracy) in the registry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., state health department, national registry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_refresh_rate" TEXT /* Rate at which the data source is refreshed (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_sources" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer case */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_source_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the data source for the cancer case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_sources_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cancer_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer type */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the cancer type (e.g., HER2-positive, triple-negative, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer case */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer type */,
  "type_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the cancer type for the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_types_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_types_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cancer_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, public health reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cancer_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., incidence rate, late-stage analysis) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the report (e.g., research, public health reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
